what_works: Homepage and contact page mention Isfahan and Tehran
Phone CTA is crawlable as tel:02128427259 and schema uses +98-21-28427259
Homepage JSON-LD includes an Isfahan LocalBusiness branch with PostalAddress
Homepage JSON-LD includes a Tehran branch with phone and PostalAddress
Contact page meta supports branch/contact intent

findings.title: Isfahan and Tehran city landing pages return 404
findings.description: Live checks found /اصفهان/, /تهران/, /بهترین-مشاور-کنکور-اصفهان/, and /بهترین-مشاور-کنکور-تهران/ returning 404, leaving homepage/contact/schema to carry all local relevance.
findings.recommendation: Create dedicated city hubs and city-service pages with unique copy, visible NAP, maps, branch proof, FAQs, CTAs, and internal links.

findings.title: Branch NAP and local schema are incomplete
findings.description: Schema exposes street/city/phone, but no postal code, geo coordinates, opening hours, hasMap, or branch-specific URL was confirmed.
findings.recommendation: Complete PostalAddress fields and add geo, openingHours, hasMap, branch URLs, and visible NAP blocks that exactly match schema.

findings.title: Tehran branch type is weaker than Isfahan
findings.description: Isfahan is typed as LocalBusiness, while Tehran is typed as EducationalOrganization. This creates inconsistent local entity interpretation.
findings.recommendation: Add a local business-compatible Tehran branch node or type array while preserving the education context.

findings.title: GBP and branch citation signals are not surfaced
findings.description: No Google Business Profile URL, review source, map profile URL, or branch-specific citation link was confirmed in homepage schema.
findings.recommendation: Add eligible GBP links and verified citation profiles, keeping NAP identical across website, GBP, schema, and visible copy.
